title: Low-Fat Creamy Noodles
description: A delicious and healthy low-fat creamy noodles dish, perfect for a quick weeknight meal. This recipe uses low-fat cream and lean turkey to reduce the calorie count.
instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, sauté the diced turkey breast over medium-high heat until browned.
Add the low-sodium chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Stir in the low-fat cream and garlic powder. Reduce heat to medium-low and let simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss with the creamy sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Sprinkle with dried parsley and serve hot.
